# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  MR_TITLE: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
  MR_DESCRIPTION: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION
  COMMIT_MESSAGE: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE

before_script:
  - echo "MR Title: $MR_TITLE"
  - echo "MR Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_ID

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Commit message: $COMMIT_MESSAGE"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Testing with MR description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Deploying with MR description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Commit message: $COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - |
      if [ -n "$MR_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Creating tag with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
        git tag "deploy-$MR_TITLE"
        git push origin "deploy-$MR_TITLE"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com

release_notes_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Generating release notes"
    - |
      if [ -n "$MR_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Release Note: $MR_TITLE" >> release-notes.txt
        echo "Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION" >> release-notes.txt
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release-notes.txt
  only:
    - main
